RunState.Notes: Chunk 5 closed 2026-05-10: bd_id=aisw-5; M-CLASSIFIER-STAGE0 (schema/backend/stage0/time_parse + 2 prompts); 24 chunk-5 tests pass; full unit suite 89/89; ruff+format+mypy+grace lint clean; total-test gate green. Chunk 6 closed 2026-05-10: bd_id=aisw-qoi; M-INBOX (parser + hint_cache repo + get_or_refresh_hint hot-path + ensure_inbox_wiki + templates/inbox-wiki/CLAUDE.md per D-016); 17 chunk-6 tests pass; full unit suite 106/106; ruff+format+mypy clean; grace lint exit 0 (warnings only, baseline heuristic). Chunk 7 closed 2026-05-10: bd_id=aisw-x30; M-WIKI-RUNNER (wiki/{__init__,acquire,streaming,runner}.py + 5 prompts wiki/inbox/domain-{health,finance,default}); 13 chunk-7 tests pass; full unit suite 119/119; ruff+format+mypy clean; grace lint 0 errors / 28 warnings (heuristic baseline); total-test gate green.

Chunk.title: Foundation scaffold (pyproject, settings, structlog, pre-commit)
Chunk.Outputs: uv-managed deps locked; ruff/mypy/format/grace-lint hooks pass; structlog JSON config; pydantic-settings .env loader
Chunk.Verification: uv sync; make lint; uv run python -c "import ai_steward_wiki"

Chunk.title: Storage: 3 SQLite engines + Alembic per-DB + base models
Chunk.Outputs: WAL+busy_timeout+foreign_keys engines; Alembic baselines; jobs.jobs (flat+JSON), tracker_answers, jobs_dlq; audit tables (chat_log, audit_events, admin_events, tg_updates, seen_files, dedup_hits, job_outputs, run_outputs, prompt_versions, onboarding_events); sessions tables (users, pending_users, pending_confirms, inbox_hint_cache, fsm); Pydantic discriminated union for job payloads
Chunk.Verification: alembic upgrade head per-DB; pytest tests/unit/storage; PRAGMA assertions

Chunk.title: Identity & users.toml allowlist (SIGHUP + watchdog hot-reload)
Chunk.Outputs: users.toml SSoT loader; validate-before-swap; SIGHUP primary + watchdog 500ms debounce; sessions.users sync; admin-alert on parse-error

Chunk.title: Scheduler core: queue, semaphore, locks, DLQ, failure taxonomy
Chunk.Outputs: APScheduler+SQLAlchemyJobStore; PriorityQueue 5 lanes; Semaphore(MAX_CONCURRENT_CLI=4); per-WIKI in-memory Lock + on-disk fcntl.flock; SIGTERM→10s→SIGKILL kill-seq; Transient/Permanent/Unknown taxonomy; auto-disable after 3 strikes (timeout counted); jobs_dlq
Chunk.Verification: pytest tests/unit/scheduler; deadlock-order test; kill-sequence test

Chunk.title: Classifier Stage-0 Haiku CLI + NL time parser
Chunk.Outputs: Claude Haiku CLI subprocess with --json-schema, allowed/disallowedTools, dontAsk; FakeClaudeRunner Protocol; semver+sha256 → audit.prompt_versions; dateparser→Haiku-fallback→escalation; UTC storage
Chunk.Verification: pytest tests/unit/classifier with FakeRunner; integration nightly with real CLI

Chunk.title: Inbox-WIKI materialize + Inbox-hint cache
Chunk.Outputs: Per-user Inbox-WIKI/ on first contact; ## Inbox hint regex parser; sessions.inbox_hint_cache with metadata+sha256 atomic swap; ~80% TTFB economy

Chunk.title: Wiki Stage-1a/1b runner (Sonnet CLI + streaming + locks)
Chunk.Outputs: claude CLI subprocess with --add-dir, --append-system-prompt @file, --output-format stream-json; strict acquire-order semaphore→memlock→flock; stale-lock recovery by PID; atomic tmp+os.replace
Chunk.Verification: pytest tests/unit/wiki; integration single-shot; lock contention test

Chunk.title: Wiki lifecycle (NL pre-flight, anti-spam, soft-delete, CLAUDE.md frontmatter)
Chunk.Outputs: Cyrillic→Latin ISO9 + PascalCase + -WIKI suffix regex ^[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9]*-WIKI$; lookup primary/hyphenated; cap 20 + Levenshtein≤2 anti-spam; soft-delete to _trash/ 30d retention; 5-step pre-flight grounding; managed/user-zone CLAUDE.md frontmatter+linear migration v1→v2
Chunk.Verification: pytest tests/unit/wiki/lifecycle; INV-7 no direct command grep

Chunk.title: Idempotency: tg_updates (24h) + seen_files (30d) dedup
Chunk.Outputs: L1 TG update_id dedup; L2 SHA-256 content dedup with inline-confirm on collision; both layers in audit.db

Chunk.title: Telegram I/O text: aiogram bot + allowlist + confirmations + output-sizing + streaming edits
Chunk.Outputs: aiogram 3 dispatcher; allowlist gate; graduated 3-tier confirmation (auto/implicit/explicit) + 10min TTL; size hybrid (≤3500/≤10000/>10000+Haiku-summary+document); HTML parse_mode + balancer; edit-throttle 1.5s/Δ50; chain-split 4000; final-flush guarantee; persist run_outputs
Chunk.Verification: pytest tests/unit/tg; integration with TG sandbox

Chunk.title: Voice & photo input (faster-whisper + vision delegation + staging→raw)
Chunk.Outputs: faster-whisper CTranslate2 CPU ru/en RTF≤0.5; photo→Sonnet vision; _staging/<run_id>_<sha8>.<ext> → atomic move to <wiki>/raw/media/; 24h staging retention
Chunk.Verification: pytest tests/unit/tg/voice with bundled wav fixtures

Chunk.title: Onboarding + admin (pending_users, intro lint, /admin elevate, TENANCY_MODE)
Chunk.Outputs: /start unknown→pending_users 14d; admin inline-approve; mandatory 6-element intro with HTML markers; lint exit-1 on missing slug; TENANCY_MODE single|multi; /admin elevate 30min; admin_events audit; admin shadow channel (failures only, no content)

Chunk.title: PII redactor + retention purge jobs
Chunk.Outputs: structlog processor; tier-1 DROP, tier-2 MASK with hash, tier-3 plaintext+0600; APScheduler maintenance jobs for every store per §10.4 retention-table; trash sweep (tier-1 DROP / tier-2 MASK)
Chunk.Verification: pytest tests/unit/ops/pii (NIST tier-1/2 fixtures); retention coverage matrix test against §10.4

Chunk.title: Backup MVP + per-WIKI git + restore-test
Chunk.Outputs: db_snapshot daily 03:00 UTC VACUUM INTO state/snapshots/<UTC>/, 7d rolling 0700; per-WIKI git init+auto-commit fmt <job_id>(<cat>): <title>; gitleaks pre-commit; .gitignore (.wiki.lock, data/runs/); restore runbook

Chunk.title: Templates: domain presets + inbox + onboarding + frontmatter migration
Chunk.Outputs: 10 domain presets + _default + inbox + onboarding-intro; frontmatter schema_version/template_id/last_migrated_at/template_sha256; managed/user-zone HTML markers; ## Inbox hint section per preset

Chunk.title: Deployment: systemd units, slices, sysusers, runbook
Chunk.Outputs: aisw-bot service with CAP_SETUID/CAP_SETGID; per-CLI systemd-run --scope --uid=aisw-N --unit=cli-<job_id>; transient scope props (MemoryMax=2G, TasksMax=64, ProtectSystem=strict, ReadOnlyPaths=<service>/prompts and CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR); aisw-bot.slice MemoryHigh=12G/Max=16G; aisw-stt.slice 4G/CPUQuota=200%; per-user UID via systemd-sysusers drop-in

Chunk.title: Verification suite + INV grep-lints + integration nightly
Chunk.Inputs: scripts/{lint_invariants.py,lint_onboarding.py,lint_templates.py}; tests/integration/; tests/e2e_checklist.md; .github/workflows/ci.yml (or Makefile-only if no GH)
Chunk.Outputs: 14 INV grep-checks automated; RUN_INTEGRATION=1 nightly target; manual E2E checklist; coverage ≥80% core
